name: Pricing on the WhatsApp Business Platform - Meta for Developers
snippet: This document explains how pricing works on the WhatsApp Business Platform. Cloud API and Marketing Messages API for WhatsApp.

name: WhatsApp Business Platform Pricing
snippet: Businesses using our platform are charged on a per-message basis for each message we deliver to users. We charge when a message is delivered (not sent).
